# ChinesePinyinIME local dictionary sample
# Format:
# pinyin=candidate1,candidate2,candidate3
#
# Rules:
# 1. Use lowercase pinyin without tone marks.
# 2. Put the most common candidate first. Space key will select the first candidate.
# 3. Separate candidates with English commas.
# 4. Lines starting with # are comments.
#
# Generated by ChatGPT for a starter Chinese pinyin dictionary.
# Content includes common single characters, words, and short phrases.
# Notes:
# - Pinyin uses lowercase letters only.
# - The letter v is used for ü, for example lv=绿,率,旅,律.
# - This is a starter dictionary, not a complete commercial IME dictionary.
